notes: No official machine-readable spec exists for Magpi. Authored by hand from the adaptor's compiled source (which hard-codes the real endpoints) plus Magpi Outbound/Inbound API support docs. The adaptor calls two endpoints: fetchSurveyData -> POST https://www.magpi.com/api/surveydata/v3 (form-encoded credentials; XML SurveyDataList response), and submitRecord -> POST {apiUrl}/mobileApi/uploadData (XML <form> body). The closely-related real v2 (sub-form data) and v1 Get Survey Data variants are also included for coverage. The upstream API is XML-based; response schemas model the JSON shape the adaptor produces after xml2js conversion (SurveyDataList.SurveyData, with dynamic per-form answer fields). SurveyData.additionalProperties captures form-specific answers. Auth (username + accesstoken for outbound, username/password for inbound) is not modelled as securitySchemes since it is passed inline in the form/config.
